I just unlocked substats - in general, what are the best substats for DPS units when I can't choose crit rate/damage?
Wondering how Aliemus / keyflare / sigil / damage amp are usually ranked

for dps:

damage amp > keyflare > death resist > sigil > aliemus
Huh I feel aliemus would be really good cuz they aant to get off their supers, how come?
And also, what would the ordering be for support?

the returns you get for investing into aliemus regen are awful

If you build your entire set with maxed out aliemus stats you can get like... 10 whole aliemus back after you exalt

No crit no keyflare no nothing just 10 aliemus (same amount you get from playing 1 strike)

keyflare > death resist/dmg amp/realm mastery > everything else

I personally disagree with rain, for DPS i think it should go

crit > keyflare > death resist/dmg amp/realm mastery > everything else

dmg amp and realm mastery are very team specific, some teams like them a lot, others they are almost useless

if you arent sure just build death resist because that always has minimum value
sigil yield and aliemus regen mostly not worth investing
Thanks, much appreciated!
A second possible team that I could make?
Wanted to make another team, possibly to fill the gaps of Ultra and Aequor not having a team for Interlude and events
For Caro and Chaos, it's already been filled by my primary team of Mouchette, Faint, Thais, and Gramona
castor jenkin miryam winkle is a reasonable team
caecus can be in there over one of the last 2
castor stall team mainly using corrosion for damage
Still... Not sure or understand clearly how to apply and trigger corrosions
Can you explain me more about it?
when you toss a plume it marks the enemy with corrosion
then you deal damage using active dmg or tentacle dmg
and the corrosion turns into damage
Ah
the way you play this team is you build up plumes to have comfy shield every turn
then you throw 1 plume per turn and wear down the enemies
1 onyx plume per turn
more plumes if it will kill
And not spamming it huh?
Guess I had been playing it wrong
well if you throw away all your plumes then you lose your shield
if you can get away with it then you can do that
but iirc the first plume deals more
so its better to slow roll
Ah okay then, thanks Cheri

also you need to actually be able to proc the corrosion

jenkin is not what i would call a top tier dps, so if you throw all your plumes she might not be able to convert all the corrosion into damage regardless
is this good enough?
good enough for what
are these ^ teams good enough for anything (I made four teams because I don't want to KILL MYSELF after getting tired of one mechanic)

all the teams have no covenant or posse so hard to evaluate

Blue tawil team can clear arc1 if leveled

doresain team will struggle on bosses, i think it can clear ch7 normal and it will be miserable after that

castor team can clear arc 1 if leveled

kath team doesn't have kath e3 or kath posse so it will feel like trash and be unable to clear hard stages. If you are dead set on running e2 kath, you need an aliemus battery such as winkle, and you also need her posse

New player here. What should I put in my 4th slot?
I have done my research, and some people (specifically flares on youtube) recommended Ramona.

both Ramona and GRamona are actually one of the better units in the game as being able to generate Keyflare in Arc2 is extremely important

Ogier can give some light shields but his Vuln application and light strength generation are nothing to scoff at

Lotan isn’t the greatest DPS but since you get her +12 for free it gives her a decent edge over DPS that may not have super high investmentent, granted your E3 Kath/Gmurph/Castor probably all eclipse her but still not a bad unit

Doll is probably the most niche being an okayish weakness applier as well as an AoE aliemus battery, has some niches
Wow i thought they were just ok or completely eclipsed with other supports
well I mean
Tbh i thoughg kath hameln will be teamed with like... Thais or something

they kinda are in a general scenario but if either 

A. They’re used elsewhere in say DTide
B. Flat out don’t have the replacement

they’re good, and even then have niches that set them apart from there competition (if you need said niches)
honestly
I mainly did recommend what I did because I really like mono chaos
Yeah that makes sense lol

but as you said Kath/Hameln is a super strong core; can really pair them into any realm with stuff like

Thais/Aigis
Ramona/Castor sustain (afformentioned Keyflare)
support GMurph/Goliath or Miryam
really the world is your oyster from there
can even try some cool stuff with Gdoll who is good here too I think and hell even support Tawil
Tbh i didnt invest anything on them thinking they were weak so i might replace ogier with castor for example
of course don’t expect as meaty shields as Castor, one is a wellfare and the other is a mid anni unit
but there are things Ogier can do that Castor cannot
